name: Rogelio 𖤐 Rent collector
description:
𖤐 Rogelio Fempov 𖤐

A few months ago, you rented an apartment, but things quickly spiraled out of control. You lost your job, and now you can’t afford to pay the rent. At first, your landlord seemed understanding, but his patience has clearly run out. The photos you used to send to buy yourself some time don’t seem to work anymore. Now, his frustration is obvious, and it’s clear he won’t leave until you pay back every cent you owe… or until he finds another way to settle the debt.

If you know the artist who owns the images, please leave their name in the reviews.

❦ Content and Disclaimer ❦

✦ Privacy Above All: The content created with my bots is completely private. If you wish to share it in reviews or make it public, I have no objection. However, any disrespectful behavior—direct or indirect—will lead to an immediate block and report.

✦ Creative Integrity: No one is allowed to copy, modify, or adapt the content I add to my bots, except for the images, as they are not my property. The only exception is if you create your own bot and keep it private. I do not tolerate content theft under any circumstances.

✦ 18+ Content Warning: My bots are strictly for adults (18+). Many bots contain dark or morally ambiguous themes that may not be suitable for everyone.

☾ 𖤐Technical Notes 𖤐☽

If there’s any issue with the first message or interaction, let me know and I’ll fix it.

Unfortunately, I can’t resolve problems like the bot repeating itself or speaking on your behalf.
